title: Auto-advancing hero carousels in AI-generated marketing pages
sourceLocation: Review of AI-generated landing pages and marketing site code
summary: AI-generated marketing pages frequently include auto-advancing hero carousels without pause controls, reducing content visibility and user control.
supportingClaims: Auto-advancing carousels advance before users finish reading, reducing content comprehension.
NN Group research shows that fewer than 1% of users interact with hero carousels, making auto-advance an ineffective content delivery mechanism.
